title: Lean CategoryGraph interface demand extracted from the authored Sage ledger
authority: Interface demand only. This manifest records which stable identifiers a released registry must resolve for this repository to evaluate its rows. It is not an authority for generic Lean definitions.

occurrences.parameter_constraints: C : additive/abelian category; degree convention parameter
finite field F_q, function ring F_q[T], field K, and base morphism γ
Sage leaves the constant field implicit
G : Sets (Sage usually supplies a group)
R : CommutativeRings; object-dependent level/anemic Hecke action
R : CommutativeRings; σ endomorphism and/or σ-derivation δ
R : CommutativeRings/Fields; quantum-group/root datum parameters are part of the representation structure
R typically ZZ, QQ, RR, or an ordered coefficient ring
base space/scheme X and scalar data R

occurrences.resolution: Use LatticePosets.Distributive@Lattice as the definition; record the Sage implementation route as a backend discrepancy.
Attach Division at Rings; define DivisionRings := Rings.Division and Fields := DivisionRings.Commutative.

Let normalized Modules(R) mean left R-modules. Map Sage LeftModules(R) to Modules(R), RightModules(R) to Modules(Rᵒᵖ), and Bimodules(R,S) to the standard bimodule family. Map Sage Modules(R) directly only in its reliable commutative/symmetric regime; review noncommutative instances.

requirements.display: One magma theory, two operation roles

occurrences.resolution: Use one Magmas host; Additive is a role/presentation classifier. Preserve route/port data when an object has two operations.

occurrences.audit_rationale: Named pullback of additive- and multiplicative-role magma structures over Sets; required as the least host of distributivity.
